description.value:
Trigger A living creature comes within 15 feet of the arch

Effect The sounds of screams from the damned intensify as the arch begins to glow with planar energy. Each living creature within 60 feet of the arch must attempt a @Check[will|dc:48] saving throw. The haunt then rolls initiative.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 3} and can't reduce its frightened condition below 1 for the haunt's duration.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 4} and can't reduce its frightened condition below 2 for the duration of the haunt.

details.description: A torrent of souls pulled from Hell pours through an archway, inflicting their personal suffering on all they touch.
details.disable: @Check[occultism|dc:50] (master) or @Check[religion|dc:50] (master) to quell the souls' suffering; these checks must be attempted while adjacent to the arch, and four total successes are required to disable the haunt
details.reset: After 1 minute, the wave of souls dries up, and the haunt deactivates. Over the course of 1 hour, planar energy rebuilds in the area, and the haunt resets.
details.routine:
(1 action; divine, void) A seemingly endless flow of damned spirits emerges from the arch and washes down the street. Each creature within a @Template[type:line|distance:240] from the arch down the street takes @Damage[(4d10+24)[void]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[fortitude|dc:44|traits:divine,void] save. This line affects everyone within 20 feet of the ground.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and increases its doomed value by 1.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and increases its doomed value by 2.
